monitoring_actions: Keep proposal telemetry attached to the governance record until closure.

approval_guardrails: Require an explicit reviewer note summarizing why the cluster remains within acceptable bounds.
monitoring_actions: Track proposal outcome and rollback telemetry for one full governance cycle.

immediate_actions: Open a governance incident review before advancing any proposal in this cluster.
approval_guardrails: Require dual-house review with documented dissent handling before execution.
monitoring_actions: Publish daily status updates until the cluster returns to in-band governance behavior.
release_blockers: Do not execute proposals in this cluster until the incident review and mitigation bundle are approved.

approval_guardrails: Attach a rollback owner and execution checkpoint plan.

release_blockers: Safety-critical proposals require explicit safety council signoff and an expiry window.
monitoring_actions: Capture post-execution safety telemetry within 24 hours.

immediate_actions: Pause net-new proposals in this cluster until acceleration is explained.
approval_guardrails: Document why proposal velocity exceeds the recent baseline.
Explain why seasonal proposal volume exceeds expected levels for this proposal kind.

release_blockers: Attach the prior adverse precedent analysis and closure criteria before approval.

immediate_actions: Limit this cluster to one in-flight execution until queue repetition subsides.

monitoring_actions: Review this cluster again after the current governance window closes.

immediate_actions: Publish an emergency root-cause timeline and intended recovery path.
approval_guardrails: Bind the pause to a timed renewal vote and a public reactivation checklist.

immediate_actions: Run validator liveness and quorum simulation before enacting validator changes.
approval_guardrails: Stage validator changes behind a canary epoch and publish rollback thresholds.

immediate_actions: Split treasury release into milestone-based disbursements.
approval_guardrails: Require an independent budget reviewer for the disbursement plan.

phase_completion.release_blocker: Record the blocker as cleared in the governance incident register before execution.
phase_completion.immediate_action: Attach evidence of completion to the proposal execution packet.
phase_completion.approval_guardrail: Capture reviewer signoff and execution conditions in the governance record.
phase_completion.monitoring: Publish the monitoring record and escalation owner in the post-approval log.
